artifacts.dockerfile:
FROM ubuntu:22.04
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN ./install.sh
CMD ["./run.sh"]

enrichment.architecture_explanation: This workload requires low-level OS access and long-lived local state incompatible with ECS or Lambda's ephemeral filesystems, so a self-managed EC2 fleet was chosen instead.
enrichment.cost_summary: Two t3.small instances running continuously are estimated at $30.35/month (range: $24.28-$36.42).
enrichment.finops_justification: Reserved Instances are recommended over Spot because the deployment has no automated instance replacement logic to tolerate Spot interruptions.
